description: 1941 Japanese surprise attack on the U.S
description_wiki: On December 7, 1941, the Empire of Japan launched a surprise military strike on the United States Pacific Fleet at its naval base at Pearl Harbor on Oahu, Hawaii.

description: city in California, United States
description_wiki: Tulare (  tuu-LAIR-ee) is a city in Tulare County, California, United States.

description: Internment camp for Japanese-Americans during World War II
description_wiki: The Gila River War Relocation Center was an American concentration camp in Arizona, one of several built by the War Relocation Authority (WRA) during the Second World War for the incarceration of Japanese Americans from the West Coast of the United States.

description: state of the United States of America
description_wiki: Montana (  mon-TAN-ə) is a landlocked state in the Mountain West subregion of the Western United States.

description: city in and county seat of Weber County, Utah, United States
description_wiki: Ogden ( OG-dən) is a city in and the county seat of Weber County, Utah, United States, located approximately 10 miles (16 km) east of the Great Salt Lake and 40 miles (64 km) north of Salt Lake City.

aliases: Royal City of the Holy Faith of St. Francis of Assisi
description: capital city of New Mexico, United States
description_wiki: Santa Fe ( SAN-tə FAY, -⁠ fay; Spanish: [santa ˈfe]; Spanish for 'Holy Faith') is the capital city of the U.S. state of New Mexico.

description: city in Texas, United States
description_wiki: Crystal City is a city in and the county seat of Zavala County, Texas, United States.

description: state of the United States of America
description_wiki: Hawaii (  hə-WY-ee; Hawaiian: Hawaiʻi [həˈvɐjʔi, həˈwɐjʔi]) is an island state of the United States, in the Pacific Ocean about 2,000 miles (3,200 km) southwest of the U.S. mainland.

description: sovereign state in South America
description_wiki: Peru, officially the Republic of Peru, is a country in western South America.

description: consolidated city and county in California, United States
description_wiki: San Francisco, officially the City and County of San Francisco, is the fourth-most populous city in California and the 17th-most populous in the United States, with a population of 826,079 in 2025.

aliases: The town of Our Lady the Queen of the Angels of the Little Portion
description: seat of Los Angeles County, and largest city in California, United States
description_wiki: Los Angeles (often referred to by its initials, LA) is the most populous city in the U.S. state of California, and the commercial, financial, and cultural center of Southern California.

description: U.S. federal law enforcement agency
description_wiki: The Federal Bureau of Investigation (FBI) is the domestic intelligence and security service of the United States and its principal federal law enforcement agency.

description: American Nazi organization
description_wiki: The German American Bund, or the German American Federation (German: Amerikadeutscher Bund, Amerikadeutscher Volksbund, AV), was a German-American Nazi movement organization which was established in 1936 as a successor to the Friends of New Germany (FONG, FDND in German) and disbanded in 1941 when the United States entered World War II. The organization chose its new name in order to emphasize its American credentials after the press accused it of being unpatriotic.

description: Japanese people who were the first generation of immigrants from Japan
description_wiki: Issei (一世, "first generation") are Japanese immigrants to countries in North America and South America.

description: collection of sacred books in Judaism and Christianity
description_wiki: The Bible is a collection of religious texts that are central to Christianity and Judaism, and esteemed in other Abrahamic religions such as Islam.

description: Class I freight-hauling railroad in the United States
description_wiki: The Union Pacific Railroad Company (reporting marks UP, UPP, UPY) is an American Class I freight-hauling railroad that operates 8,300 locomotives over 32,200 miles (51,800 km) routes in 23 U.S. states west of Chicago and New Orleans.

description: former American military unit
description_wiki: The Military Intelligence Service (Japanese: アメリカ陸軍情報部, America Rikugun Jōhōbu) was a World War II U.S. military unit consisting of two branches, the Japanese American unit (described here) and the German-Austrian unit based at Camp Ritchie, best known as the "Ritchie Boys".

aliases: Queen City of the Pacific and others
description: capital city of the Philippines
description_wiki: Manila, officially the City of Manila, is the capital and second-most populous city of the Philippines after Quezon City.

description: archipelagic country in Southeast Asia
description_wiki: The Philippines, officially the Republic of the Philippines, is an archipelagic country in Southeast Asia.

description: large urban region in the United States
description_wiki: Greater Los Angeles is the most populous metropolitan area in the U.S. state of California, encompassing five counties in Southern California extending from Ventura County in the west to San Bernardino County and Riverside County in the east, with the city of Los Angeles and Los Angeles County at its center, and Orange County to the southeast.

description: city in Bexar, Comal, and Medina counties in Texas, United States, that is the seat of Bexar County

aliases: Texas San Antonio Paseo del Rio
San Antonio River Walk (Paseo del Rio)
description: park in Texas, United States of America
description_wiki: The San Antonio River Walk is a city park and special-case pedestrian street in San Antonio, Texas, one level down from the automobile street.

description: prefecture of Japan
description_wiki: Okayama Prefecture (岡山県, Okayama-ken; Japanese pronunciation: [o.kaꜜ.ja.ma, o.ka.ja.maꜜ.keɴ]) is a prefecture of Japan located in the Chūgoku region of Honshu.

description: capital city of Hiroshima Prefecture, Japan
description_wiki: Hiroshima (広島市, Hiroshima-shi; English: , also UK: , US: , Japanese: [çiɾoɕima] ) is the capital of Hiroshima Prefecture in Japan.

description: human settlement in Japan
description_wiki: Uraga (浦賀) is a subdivision of the city of Yokosuka, Kanagawa Prefecture, Japan.

description: bay in Japan
description_wiki: Tokyo Bay (東京湾, Tōkyō-wan) is a bay located in the southern Kantō region of Japan spanning the coasts of Tokyo, Kanagawa Prefecture, and Chiba Prefecture, on the southern coast of the island of Honshu.

description: American nonprofit organization
